hook: Belonging is easier to build when your environments match your actual temperament rather than your fantasy persona.
body: Confidence grows faster in rooms where you can participate honestly than in rooms chosen only because they seem impressive.
voices: The School of Life, Vanessa Van Edwards

hook: Men sometimes force themselves into scenes that do not suit them and then conclude they are bad socially.
body: Find contexts where your real energy can become legible instead of contexts that require you to impersonate someone else.
voices: The School of Life, Vanessa Van Edwards

hook: Find contexts where your real energy can become legible instead of contexts that require you to impersonate someone else.
body: A thoughtful low-key community may suit you better than a louder scene that keeps making you feel like a worse version of yourself.
voices: The School of Life, Vanessa Van Edwards

hook: A thoughtful low-key community may suit you better than a louder scene that keeps making you feel like a worse version of yourself.
body: Choose social environments that fit your actual character strongly enough to let your best qualities show.
voices: The School of Life, Vanessa Van Edwards
